task:
Implement ISS-006: Incremental Updates for `gid extract` in the gid-rs project at /Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs/. The design document is at .gid/features/incremental-extract/DESIGN.md. Key changes:

1. Add ExtractMetadata and FileState structs (with version field, content_hash via xxHash64, mtime, node_ids, edge_count)
2. Add extract-meta.json persistence (.gid/extract-meta.json)
3. Implement 5-phase incremental pipeline: scan files → remove stale → parse changed → resolve refs → save metadata
4. Dangling edge cleanup: after removing stale nodes, scan ALL edges and remove any where source or target node_id no longer exists
5. Edge removal uses node_ids (not edge_count) to find edges belonging to a file
6. Version mismatch or corrupted metadata → full rebuild fallback
7. Add --full flag to force full rebuild
8. Performance target: <100ms for no-change case, <1s for 1-5 changed files

Source files to modify: crates/gid-core/src/code_graph/extract.rs (main), types.rs, mod.rs. New file for metadata types if needed.

project.verify_command: cargo check --features full -p gid-core 2>&1 && cargo test --features full -p gid-core 2>&1
